name: photo-gallery
description: Google-Photos-style library: timeline, albums, smart albums, map view, auto-trip detection, year-in-review, tag browser, share links, EXIF + geotag, content-hash dedup

envVars.name: GALLERY_ROOT
envVars.description: Host path mounted inside the container where gallery items live

postInstall: 1. Run DB migration to create gallery_items / gallery_albums / gallery_trips / gallery_smart_albums tables
2. Mount a host volume at GALLERY_ROOT for original files
3. Add a Leaflet stylesheet to layout.tsx (e.g. import 'leaflet/dist/leaflet.css')
4. Map view uses OpenStreetMap by default; no API key needed
5. Reverse-geocoding (geocode route) hits photon.komoot.io with a User-Agent — change to your hostname
